markdownRemark.html:
A categorized community-driven collection of high-quality, awesome LÖVE libraries, projects, and resources.

Table of contents

  • 3D
  • AI
  • Animation
  • Camera
  • Development
  • Drawing
  • Entity
  • Helper Libraries
  • Input
  • Lighting
  • Math
  • Music
  • Networking
  • Object Orientation
  • Performance
  • Physics
  • Platforms

  • Serialization
  • Shaders
  • Testing
  • Tweening
  • UI

  • Tutorials
  • IDEs
  • Game Distribution Tools

3D

3D-centric Libraries

  • 3DreamEnginestars132 - An awesome 3D engine for LÖVE.
  • anim9stars20 - 3D skeletal animation library (design to be used with IQM and IQE)
  • Brinevector3Dstars5 - FFI-enabled vector library for 3D (x,y,z)
  • bump-3dpdstars50 - A 3D collision detection library for Lua.
  • IQEstars9 - Inter-Quake Export loader (text)
  • IQMstars27 - Inter-Quake Model loader (binary)
  • love-gltf - gltf asset loader and test renderer; Supports skeletal animations and morph targets
  • Lovoxstars40 - Pseudo-3D library for working with voxels
  • g3dstars143 - Simple and easy 3D engine for LÖVE.
  • model_rendererstars8 - a simple 3d model renderer for love2d

AI

Navigation, Decision-Making and AI Libraries

  • Jumperstars544 - Grid-based pathfinding library
  • Lua-starstars27 - Easy and pure Lua A* path finding
  • astarstars4 - An other A* library. Any map(gird, point, mesh or infinite map) and support path cost.

Animation

Animation & Frame-Managing Libraries

  • androssstars27 - a Lua library for 2D skeletal/bone animations with a Löve backend
  • anim8stars459 - Animation library
  • animxstars12 - A featureful Animation library for loading animations from XML files!
  • chirostars24 - Convenience wrapper around Spine
  • Peachystars72 - A parser/renderer for Aseprite animations in LÖVE
  • skeletorstars24 - 2D skeletal animation system
  • Waltstars53 - Animation library
  • Lumpstars18 - Adobe Flash animation runtime
  • lovanimstars13 - A minimal stateful animation library
  • SYSL-Textstars21 - Text animation and automatic wrapping library based on tags

Camera

Viewport & Camera Libraries

  • Bradystars50 - Camera library with parallax scrolling
  • Editgridstars37 - Gamera and HUMP compatible scaling grid
  • gamerastars170 - Camera system
  • hump.camera - Camera library with window locking and smooth camera movement interpolation
  • STALKER-Xstars214 - STALKER-X is a camera module for LÖVE

Development

Development assisting Libraries, that enrich your development experience

  • FPSGraphstars13 - Small FPS graphing utility
  • debugGraphstars26 - Small OO FPS graphing utillity based on FPSGraph
  • Lovebirdstars227 - Browser-based debug console
  • LoveDebugstars87 - Inline console-like debugger utility
  • lurkerstars210 - Auto-swaps changed Lua files in a running game
  • LÖVE APIstars209 - The complete API documentation of LÖVE in a Lua table
  • LÖVE Buildstars25 - GitHub Action for automated cross-platform builds
  • LÖVE TypeScript Definitionsstars60 - Write LÖVE games with TypeScript
  • lovelierstars6 - A Love2D live reloader with Moonscript support

Drawing

Drawing specific Libraries, that simplify the Drawing process

  • Artalstars34 - A .PSD parsing library for LÖVE
  • Autobatchstars87 - Small LÖVE module to automate the use of SpriteBatches
  • centerstars3 - A simple module to dynamically align and fit content to screens of any size
  • cindystars15 - Use byte color values in LÖVE 11+
  • deepstars28 - Adds Z axis; allows you to queue actions and draw calls
  • draftstars38 - A module for drawing complex shapes
  • HSLUVstars30 - Lua implementation of HSLuv (a human-friendly alternative to HSL)
  • Maid64stars36 - Low resolution scaler for LÖVE
  • Pushstars311 - A simple resolution-handling library for LÖVE
  • renderplanetstars18 - realistic orthographic planet rendering
  • svgloverstars40 - Library to import and display simple SVGs in LÖVE
  • SYSL-Pixelstars12 - Pixel art focused scaler for graphics, position, screen-captures and shaders
  • Sölarstars4 - a fairly simple solar system simulator
  • Tove2dstars116 - Animated vector graphics for LÖVE
  • turtle.luastars62 - Turtle graphics library for LÖVE

Entity

Entity and Gameobject Managing Libraries

  • adorbsstars22 - Minimal, Functional Entity Component System
  • Concordstars104 - A feature-complete ECS library
  • knife.system - Minimalist functional ECS
  • natastars33 - Hybrid OOP/ECS entity management
  • tiny-ecsstars385 - Entity Component System for Lua that's simple, flexible, and useful

Helper Libraries

Game specific Library bundles, that provide reuseable functions

  • astraystars103 - Astray is a lua based maze, room and dungeon generation library for dungeon crawlers and roguelike video games
  • batteriesstars70 - fills out lua's sparse standard library and provides implementations of common algorithms and data structures useful for games.
  • cartographerstars48 - Small Tiled map loader and drawer.
  • clovestars12 - A helper library which allows you to quickly loads huge amount of assets
  • humpstars786 - Collection of tools for developing games with LÖVE (Gamestates, Timers/Tweens, Vectors, Classes, Signals, Cameras). Repo is inactive but improvements are in the works at this fork (branch temp-master)
  • iffystars13 - A SpriteSheet and Tileset helper library for LÖVE
  • knifestars281 - Collection of useful micro-modules for Lua (Class, State Machines, Bind, Chain, Coroutines, Event, Memoize, Entity, Tests, Timer)
  • shardstars9 - Collection of useful mini modules
  • lovely-windowsstars10 - A Window/Screen Manager Module for virtual windows.
  • love-state-switcherstars7 - State switcher class for Lua LÖVE Engine
  • luestars36 - lue is a LÖVE library that allows you to display hue color effects in your game
  • lumestars574 - Collection of functions for Lua, geared towards game development
  • narratorstars35 - An Ink narrative scripting language parser and runtime implementation
  • reflowprintstars32 - A library designed for alignment of text that is shown one character at a time
  • roomystars21 - screen management library for LÖVE
  • rotLovestars194 - Roguelike Toolkit in Love. A Love2D/lua port of rot.js
  • ScreenManagerstars27 - Screen/State Management for the LÖVE framework
  • shackstars44 - shack is a LÖVE library that lets you easily add screen effects such as shake and rotation
  • Simple Tiled Implementationstars589 - Tiled map loader and renderer
  • Vividstars45 - Color math, manipulation and conversion library
  • Yonderstars6 - A ridiculously easy to use game state management library for LOVE2D

Input

Input & Binding Libraries

  • batonstars124 - Input library for LÖVE that bridges the gap between keyboard and gamepad controls
  • boipushystars140 - A simple and easy to use input handler
  • inputstars1 - Simple and powerful input library. support check operation time, sequence.
  • love-microphonestars53 - Simple microphone support for LÖVE
  • LoveKeysstars5 - A simple input handeling library that keeps track of things for you
  • tactilestars47 - A straightforward and flexible input library

Lighting

Lighting & Shadow Libraries

  • lighterstars11 - A performant dynamic light implementation with a simple API
  • Shädowsstars136 - A Shadows & Lights engine for löve
  • Light Worldstars199 - A lighting model
  • Simple Love Lightsstars19 - A very simple raycasting light implementation
  • Lightstars6 - A simple dynamic light implementation

Math

Math specific Libraries

  • Bresenhamstars9 - Bresenham's line algorithm written in Lua
  • brinevectorstars32 - Standalone lightweight luajit ffi-accelerated 2D vector library for great performance
  • Cirno's Perfect Math Librarystars187 - Math/intersection library designed for games
  • delaunaystars86 - Delaunay triangulation for convex polygons
  • hump.vector - Powerful 2D vector class
  • MLibstars63 - Math and shape-intersection detection library written in Lua. It's aim is to be robust and easy to use
  • nvec - hump.vector-compatible LuaJIT FFI-accelerated 2D vector library
  • shashstars40 - A simple, lightweight spatial hash for Lua
  • vector.luastars18 - a simple vector library based on the PVector class from processing

Music

Music related libraries

  • denverstars57 - A Löve custom waveform generation library
  • lovebpmstars53 - A LÖVE library for syncing events to the BPM of an audio track
  • ripplestars14 - An audio manager with tagging support
  • wavestars76 - A sound manager with audio parsing and rhythm functionalities

Networking

Networking & Online-Play Libraries

  • Grease - Networking library intended to make networking easy for lovers (TCP, UDP, Enet) [IPv6]
  • LoverNetstars51 - A networking library that leverages bitser and enet [IPv4]
  • NoobHubstars260 - OpenSource multiplayer and network messaging [IPv6]
  • Sock.luastars125 - A Lua networking library for LÖVE games [IPv4]
  • löve-wsstars14 - A websocket client and server library
  • love2d-lua-websocketstars3 - A simple event-driven websocket client library [IPv4]

Object Orientation

Object Orientation Libraries that support Class-Commonsstars41

  • 30logstars316 - Minified framework for object-orientation in Lua. It features named (and unnamed) classes, single inheritance and a basic support for mixins
  • classicstars511 - Tiny class module for Lua. Attempts to stay simple and provide decent performance by avoiding unnecessary over-abstraction
  • hump.class - Small, fast class/prototype implementation with multiple inheritance (class-commons)
  • knife.base - Extremely minimal base class providing single inheritance and constructors.
  • middleclassstars1.3k - Simple OOP library for Lua; has inheritance, metamethods (operators), class variables and weak mixin support (class-commons)
  • muunstars5 - Moonscript compatible class implementation
  • selenestars3 - Project template for writing games in Moonscript instead of Lua without precompiling

Performance

Performance measurement tools

  • jprofstars58 - Profiling library/tool for LÖVE
  • Piefillerstars17 - Graphical profiler for LÖVE
  • profile.lua - Profile.lua is a small, non-intrusive module for finding bottlenecks in your Lua code
  • ProFi - A simple lua profiler that works with LuaJIT and prints a pretty report file in columns

Physics

Collision Detection & Physics Wrappers

  • breezefieldstars15 - A lightweight and easy love.physics wrapper [windfield alternative]
  • Bumpstars667 - Collision detection library for Lua
  • HC - Collision detection with arbitrary polygons; allows rotation of objects
  • loveblobsstars52 - A softbody library with support for both dynamic and static arbitrary softbodies.
  • Windfieldstars260 - Physics module wrapper for LÖVE

Platforms

Ports for Platforms other than Windows, Mac and Linux

  • LoveDosstars571 - A Lua framework for 2D DOS games, implementing a subset of the LÖVE API
  • LoveFTW - Work-in-progress port to Windows phone 8.1
  • LovePotionstars288 - Unofficial work-in-progress implementation of the LÖVE API for Nintendo 3DS and Nintendo Switch Homebrew
  • LOVE-WrapLuastars20 - A small and simple wrapper for OneLua, lpp-vita, and Lua Player PS3
  • Love.jsstars180 - LÖVE ported to the web using Emscripten
  • LÖVRstars771 - LÖVE for virtual reality devices

Publishing

Guides to distributing LÖVE games in 3rd party stores

  • Love-Snap-Templatestars21 - A template for packaging LÖVE games for distribution in the Snappy Store
  • AppImageKitstars6.4k - Using AppImageKit you can package LÖVE games as AppImages that run on common Linux-based operating systems, such as RHEL, CentOS, Ubuntu, Fedora, debian and derivatives; one game = one file

Serialization

Save Game & Storage Libraries

  • binserstars137 - Customizable Lua Serializer
  • bitserstars115 - Serializes and deserializes Lua values with LuaJIT
  • cdatastars30 - Serialize between Lua data and C data using LuaJIT's FFI
  • knife.serialize - Serialize data as a Lua script
  • Ladystars33 - Saving and loading savegames; based on Ser
  • moonblobstars13 - Binary serialization and data parsing library
  • Serstars66 - Fast, robust, richly-featured table serialization library for Lua
  • Smallfolkstars13 - A fast, robust, secure, richly-featured table serialization library for Lua
  • tricklestars28 - A bitstream library focused on high compression for use in networking

Shaders

GLSL related Libraries

  • LoveShaderConverterstars52 - Convert Shadertoy Shader files to LÖVE GLSL Files with handy utilities for infinite purposes
  • Shadertoy viewer - Run code copied from shadertoy directly or output the converted code to a LÖVE shader
  • Moonshinestars384 - Repository of common post-processing effects like blur, vignette, color-grading, etc.

Testing

Libraries and Tools for Unit Testing

  • bustedstars993 - Simple unit-testing framework with customizable assertions
  • knife.test - Fixture-free test framework
  • Luassertstars103 - Extends assert() with additional, customizable tests
  • Lunateststars69 - xUnit-style randomized unit testing framework
  • luststars60 - Minimal test framework
  • Specl - Behavior Driven Development (BDD) tool
  • Telescope - Highly-customizable BDD-style testing library

Tweening

Smoothing & Timer Libraries

  • Fluxstars235 - A fast, lightweight tweening library for Lua
  • hump.timer - Timer and tweening library with flexible tweening methods
  • knife.timer - Create timers and tweens with ease.
  • tickstars58 - Lua module for delaying function calls
  • tween.luastars421 - Tweening/Easing/Interpolating functions for Lua inspired on jQuery's animate method

UI

User Interface Libraries

  • CatUIstars68 - A very light-weight GUI library for LÖVE
  • GOOistars167 - Android-oriented GUI library
  • Gspöt - A stateful GUI lib for LÖVE
  • Hanker - Maximalist immediate mode-ish UI elements; gamepad-friendly
  • LoveFrames Forkstars67 - 11.2 Fork of a GUI library
  • Love Imguistars259 - imgui module for the LÖVE game engine
  • Löve-Nuklearstars283 - Lightweight immediate mode GUI for LÖVE games
  • Patchystars30 - 9patch library
  • Polywell - A highly-configurable text editor / coding tool written in Lua that runs on the LÖVE game engine.
  • SafeWordstars2 - An overscan detection library for LÖVE
  • Slabstars136 - Slab is an immediate mode GUI toolkit for the LÖVE framework.
  • SUITstars379 - small immediate mode GUI library
  • ListBoxstars14 - A dynamic ListBox for LÖVE that supports touch, mouse, and keyboard inputs
  • Lynx - Very-lightweight list-based UI library.
  • YALGstars7 - A very simple, cross-platform, reactive UI for last minute UIs.
  • Heliumstars26 - A modern, customizable, high performance retained UI framework.

Utilities

Non-Game specific libraries and tools

  • ArrayRotation - Rotation of two dimensional arrays (square and non-square)
  • cargostars119 - Asset manager
  • chance.lua - Library for generating random data
  • colorchangerstars1 - Change the colors in your LÖVE game
  • Flirtstars10 - LÖVE version manager; allows to switch between multiple versions of engine on same machine
  • GifCatstars36 - A simple module for saving gifs from LÖVE
  • hex2colorstars3 - A single function to use HEX color values
  • i18nstars17 - Internationalization library designed to help localize your game
  • Ini Parserstars6 - General purpose ini configuration parser
  • log.luastars216 - Library for configurable log output
  • love-loaderstars108 - Threaded resource loading
  • love2d-assets-loaderstars31 - Assets Loader
  • love-pestars12 - A tool made in LÖVE for changing LÖVE icon itself
  • lovely-enginestars2 - A tool that makes setting up and using Love2d easier and with Moonscript support
  • Lilystars66 - Async Asset Loader
  • luasteamstars40 - Lua bindings for the Steamworks API
  • Luventstars64 - Simple event-driven programming
  • nativefiledialog - Open a file picker on Windows/Mac/Linux
  • nativefsstars23 - Read and write files outside of LÖVE's allowed paths
  • Optikon - WYSIWYG visual level designer
  • ParticleEditorstars1 - An editor of particle for LÖVE
  • particle-system-playgroundstars9 - A basic LÖVE particle system editor
  • splashystars21 - Splash Screen Library
  • ShakeDetectorLuastars4 - uses accelerometer data for shake device detection written in Lua
  • tickstars47 - Useful timing tweaks for LÖVE's run loop

Tutorials

Blogs and tutorials

  • adnzzzzZ'sstars3k - A blog by adnzzzzZ with articles about game development using LÖVE
  • learn2love - Book for learning programming with Lua and LÖVE (Version 11.0+)
  • Using Tiled Maps in LÖVE - An article about using maps created with Tiled in your LÖVE game
  • Tutorial on making an Arkanoid-type game - A complete tutorial on how to make a breakout clone by nooowaay
  • Simple Game Tutorials - Tutorials for making simple games with LÖVE (Snake, Sokoban, Tetris, etc.)
  • How to LÖVE - A book by Sheepolution teaching LÖVE from the ground up
  • CS50’s Introduction to Game Development - Harvard College’s CS50 OpenCourseWare
  • Building love2d games for the web with love.js and Docker - A tutorial on packaging LÖVE games for the web

IDEs

Integrated Development Environments and text editor plugins

  • Atom - A hackable text editor for the 21st Century
    • Love-Atom - Smart autocompletion for the LÖVE framework in Atom.
    • Autocomplete GLSL - Adds GLSL autocompletion in Atom
    • language-glsl - OpenGL Shading Language support in Atom
    • language-lua - Lua language support in Atom
    • linter-luacheckstars12 - Lint Lua on the fly, using luacheck
    • Löve Launcher - Launch LÖVE for the current project without having to leave Atom
    • Löve IDE - This package auto-installs several utilities for writing Love2D games in Atom
      • Autocomplete Löve - Auto-complete and snippets for LÖVE
      • Hyperclick Löve - A Hyperclick provider for LÖVE which shows the wiki
      • linter-luaparse - Lua syntax error checking in Atom
  • Brackets - A modern, open source text editor by Adobe
    • Lua Syntax Highlighterstars3 - Add Lua syntax highlighting in Brackets
    • LÖVE Hints for Brackets.io - Provides LÖVE code hints
    • Run LÖVEstars4 - Run LÖVE projects with a hotkey
  • ZeroBrane Studio - ZeroBrane Studio is a lightweight Lua IDE with code completion, syntax highlighting, live coding, code analyzer, and debugging support
    • API Syntax Hightlightstars9 - Script to add LOVE API syntax highlighting to ZBS.
  • IntelliJ IDEA - Capable and Ergonomic Java IDE
    • EmmyLuastars431 - Lua IDE/Debugger Plugin for VSCode
    • Lua for IDEA - Lua plugin for IntelliJ-IDEA
    • LÖVE IDEAstars48 - Snippets and code completion for IntelliJ-IDEA
  • Vim - Vim is a highly configurable text editor built to make creating and changing any kind of text very efficient
    • Vim LOVE Docsstars44 - Syntax highlighting for Vim
  • Notepad++ - Notepad++ is a free source code editor and Notepad replacement that supports several languages
    • LÖVE API for Notepad++stars10 - Code completion and documentation for Notepad++
  • Visual Studio Code - VS Code is a new type of tool that combines the simplicity of a code editor with what developers need for their core edit-build-debug cycle
    • Visual Studio Code LÖVE Launcher - A Löve Launcher Extension for Visual Studio Code
    • Lua for Visual Studio Code - Provides Intellisense and Linting for Lua in VSCode
    • Local Lua Debugger - Simple Lua debugger with no dependencies. Löve specific launch.json example provided.
  • Sublime Text - Sublime Text is a sophisticated text editor for code, markup and prose. You'll love the slick user interface, extraordinary features and amazing performance.
    • Package Manager - The Sublime Text package manager that makes it exceedingly simple to find, install and keep packages up-to-date.
    • SublimeLove - Supports syntax highlighting, auto-completion, and build system.
    • SublimeLinter-luacheck - Provides linting and static analysis of your Lua code.

Game Distribution Tools

Tools that automate game publishing in one way or another

  • boonstars90 - Multi-platform, easy to use tool supporting Windows, macOS, Linux.
  • love-exportstars34 - Fast and simple command-line tool that builds binaries for you. Supports Windows, MacOS, and Linux.
  • love-releasestars404 - A Lua script that automates game distribution. Supports Windows, macOS, Debian, Linux.
  • makelovestars37 - Advanced multi-platform tool to fuse your game written in Python 3. Supports Windows and Linux with AppImage.

Contributing

Please see CONTRIBUTING for details.

Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-luastars2.7k - A list like this one, but more general and encompassing all of Lua's uses
  • awesome-love-shadersstars54 - A collection of shaders designed to work in LÖVE
  • awesome-pico8stars1.8k - A curated list of PICO-8 resources, tutorials, tools and more

Other awesome lists can be found in the awesome-awesomenessstars27.6k list.

awesomeList.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome LÖVE libraries, resources and shiny things.
awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of amazingly awesome LÖVE libraries, resources and shiny things.
